commands.cmd:
if [ -n "${HOSTLENS_REDIS_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then
  info=$(REDISCLI_AUTH="$HOSTLENS_REDIS_PASSWORD" redis-cli --no-auth-warning -t 5 -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 INFO persistence) || { echo "redis INFO persistence failed" >&2; exit 1; }
else
  info=$(redis-cli -t 5 -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 INFO persistence) || { echo "redis INFO persistence failed" >&2; exit 1; }
fi
aof=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^aof_enabled:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
changes=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^rdb_changes_since_last_save:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
last=$(printf '%s' "$info" | awk -F: '/^rdb_last_save_time:/{gsub(/\r/,"",$2);print $2}')
case "$aof"     in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "aof_enabled non-numeric: $aof"        >&2; exit 1;; esac
case "$changes" in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "rdb_changes non-numeric: $changes"    >&2; exit 1;; esac
case "$last"    in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "rdb_last_save_time non-numeric: $last" >&2; exit 1;; esac
printf '{"aof_enabled":%d,"rdb_changes_since_last_save":%d,"rdb_last_save_time":%d}' "$aof" "$changes" "$last"
